landing.subtitle: HesabKetab makes it effortless to track shared costs, settle debts, and stay on the same page with the people you share life with.
landing.trustedBy: Designed for friends, families, and roommates everywhere
landing.feature1Desc: See exactly who owes what at a glance. Real-time balances update instantly as expenses are added, so nobody has to wonder where they stand.
landing.feature2Desc: Equal, percentage, exact amounts, or custom shares. Whether it's a dinner for two or a month-long trip with ten friends, there's a split for that.
landing.feature3Desc: Record cash, bank transfers, or online payments. Simplified debts reduce multiple IOUs into the fewest possible transactions.
landing.feature4Desc: Create groups for your apartment, road trips, couples, or any occasion. Each group keeps its own running balance and expense history.
landing.feature5Desc: Friends not on HesabKetab yet? Send an email invite and they'll be splitting expenses with you in seconds.
landing.feature6Desc: Traveling abroad or splitting with friends in different countries? Log expenses in any currency and we'll keep the math clean.
landing.howSubtitle: Three steps to stress-free expense sharing
landing.step1Desc: Add your roommates, travel buddies, or friends. Everyone sees the same expenses and balances.
landing.step2Desc: Paid for dinner? Bought the groceries? Log it in seconds and choose how to split.
landing.step3Desc: When it's time to square up, HesabKetab shows the simplest way to settle all debts.
landing.ctaTitle: Ready to stop keeping track in your head?
landing.ctaSubtitle: Join thousands of friends and families who split expenses without the awkwardness.
landing.faqSubtitle: Quick answers to the things people ask most. Need more? See the full list.
landing.faq1A: Yes — we're focused on building the best expense-splitting experience possible. All core features are free and will stay free forever. Down the road we may introduce optional premium features, but everything you need to track, split, and settle will always be available at no cost.
landing.faq2Q: Do my friends need accounts to use it?
landing.faq2A: They'll need a free account to log in and add their own expenses, but you can invite them with one click and they'll be up and running in seconds.
landing.faq3A: Your data is encrypted and stored securely. We never share your information with third parties, and we never will. You can export or delete your data at any time.
landing.faq4A: HesabKetab supports every major world currency, plus many regional ones — over 150 in total. You can set a default currency for your account and enter any expense in any currency. Balances are tracked per-currency, so no lossy conversion happens in the background.
landing.faq5A: Absolutely. From your account settings you can download your complete history as JSON or CSV at any time. It's your data — we don't lock it in.
landing.faq6A: When you're ready to square up, HesabKetab shows the simplest set of payments that clears every balance in the group. Record a cash or digital payment and balances update instantly. The simplified debts feature can reduce many IOUs into the fewest possible transactions.
landing.faq7Q: What if someone doesn't have a HesabKetab account yet?
landing.faq7A: You can add them by email and we'll send them an invitation to join. They can sign up for free in seconds and automatically connect to your expenses and groups.
landing.faq8A: Full English and Persian (فارسی) support today, with proper right-to-left layout for Persian. More languages are on the roadmap — we want the app to feel native for everyone who uses it.
landing.faq9A: Yes. You can close your account from Settings at any time. We'll process deletion of your account and all associated data within 30 days, and you can download a full backup before you leave.
landing.faq10Q: How do I get help if something goes wrong?
landing.faq10A: The fastest way is our support form — describe what happened and we'll get back to you within one business day. You can also check this FAQ first; a lot of questions are answered here.

pages.featuresIntro: Everything you need to split expenses without the awkwardness.
pages.feat1: Real-time balance tracking — always know who owes what
pages.feat2: Flexible splitting: equal, percentage, exact amounts, or custom shares
pages.feat3: Simplified debts — we reduce transactions to the minimum needed
pages.feat4: Groups for apartments, trips, couples, and any occasion
pages.feat5: Email invitations — friends join in seconds
pages.feat7: Activity feed with full expense history
pages.feat8: Comments and notes on any expense
pages.feat9: Category tracking and monthly spending charts
pages.feat10: Export your data as JSON or CSV at any time
pages.feat11: Full English and Persian bilingual support with RTL
pages.feat12: Works on any device — desktop, tablet, and mobile
pages.pricingIntro: We believe expense splitting should be free for everyone.
pages.pricingFreeDesc: All core features — tracking, splitting, settling, groups, invitations, and data export — are completely free and will stay free forever.
pages.pricingFuture: In the future, we may introduce optional premium features for power users. But the fundamentals of splitting expenses with your friends and family will never have a paywall.
pages.aboutP1: HesabKetab (حساب‌کتاب) means "the account book" in Persian. We built it because splitting expenses with friends, roommates, and family should be simple — not stressful.
pages.aboutP2: Our mission is to take the friction out of shared finances. Whether you're splitting rent, tracking a group trip, or just figuring out who owes who for dinner, HesabKetab keeps everyone on the same page.
pages.aboutP3: We're a small team focused on building a clean, fast, and honest product. No dark patterns, no surprise paywalls, no selling your data. Just a tool that does one thing well.
pages.privacyIntro: Your privacy matters to us. This policy explains what data we collect, how we use it, and your rights.
pages.privacyCollect: We collect the information you provide when you create an account (name, email address) and the expense data you enter into the app. If you sign in with Google, we receive your name and email from Google — nothing else.
pages.privacyUse: We use your data solely to provide the HesabKetab service — showing balances, tracking expenses, and sending notifications you've opted into. We do not sell, rent, or share your personal information with third parties.
pages.privacyStorage: Your data is stored in encrypted databases hosted on secure infrastructure. We use industry-standard security practices to protect your information.
pages.privacyRights: You can export all your data at any time from your account settings. You can also request deletion of your account and all associated data by contacting us. We will process deletion requests within 30 days.
pages.privacyCookies: We use essential cookies only — for authentication and session management. We do not use advertising or tracking cookies.
pages.privacyContact: If you have questions about this policy, reach us at privacy@hesabketab.com.
pages.termsIntro: By using HesabKetab, you agree to the following terms.
pages.termsService: HesabKetab is an expense-splitting tool. We provide a platform for tracking shared expenses and balances between users. We are not a financial institution and do not process payments.
pages.termsAccount: You are responsible for maintaining the security of your account credentials. You must provide accurate information when creating an account. You may not use the service for any illegal purpose.
pages.termsContent: You retain ownership of all data you enter into HesabKetab. We do not claim any rights to your expense data, notes, or other content. You can export or delete your data at any time.
pages.termsAvailability: We strive to keep HesabKetab available at all times, but we cannot guarantee uninterrupted service. We may perform maintenance that temporarily affects availability, and we'll try to notify users in advance when possible.
pages.termsLiability: HesabKetab is provided as-is. We are not responsible for any financial disputes between users. The calculations and balances shown are tools to assist you — they are not legally binding financial records.
pages.termsChanges: We may update these terms from time to time. We'll notify users of significant changes via email or in-app notification. Continued use after changes constitutes acceptance.
pages.termsContact: Questions about these terms? Reach us at legal@hesabketab.com.
pages.supportIntro: Need a hand? Send us a note and we'll get back to you within one business day. For the fastest answer, check the common questions first.
pages.supportFormMessagePlaceholder: Describe the issue, steps to reproduce, or what you'd like us to know.
pages.supportSuccessDetail: We'll reply to the email you provided within one business day. If it's urgent, please check your spam folder for our response.
pages.supportError: Something went wrong. Please try again, or email us directly at support@hesabketab.com.
pages.supportErrorInvalidEmail: Please enter a valid email so we can reply.
pages.supportErrorMessageShort: Please add a bit more detail — at least 20 characters.
